title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement and Privacy Policy check box
scenario: Verify that the License Agreement and Privacy Policy check box on the EULA page must be checked to enable the Continue button and proceed with onboarding.
steps: Start the app for the first time.
After the initial screen, tap Continue.
Check the box for license agreement and privacy policy.
expected:
1. User cannot continue because the license check box is unchecked.
2. Checkmark appears and Continue button becomes active.
3. User can proceed with the onboarding flow.
